summary.title: Governance Control Plane -- Hero Demo
summary.description: A 60-frame replay demonstrating trust drift, suppression, probation, mutation, and recovery across five governance agents in the Syntropiq control plane.
keyEvents: Frame 40: Routing freeze + Auditor threshold breach alert

events.message: System heartbeat -- frame 40. All governance loops nominal.
Temporary routing freeze enacted: stability concerns due to prolonged Collector-9 suppression and Arbiter-3 probation. Re-evaluation in progress.
Auditor-5 threshold breach alert: prolonged suppression of Collector-9 (17 frames) impacting system data pipeline stability.

decisions.rationale: System heartbeat -- frame 40. All governance loops nominal.
Temporary routing freeze enacted: stability concerns due to prolonged Collector-9 suppression and Arbiter-3 probation. Re-evaluation in progress.
Auditor-5 threshold breach alert: prolonged suppression of Collector-9 (17 frames) impacting system data pipeline stability.

events.message: Collector-9 recovery initiated: trust climbing from 0.38. Data validation modules reloaded.
